blended.narrative: Bridger Bowl is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,903 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.0" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
